hero.title: 7 Days, the Golden Triangle.
hero.titleAccent: Delhi, Agra and Jaipur at a Relaxed Pace.
hero.intro: The Golden Triangle, unhurried. Two nights in each city means time to truly enjoy Delhi, the Taj Mahal and Jaipur, with room for the markets, the food and the lesser-seen corners. The classic route, done in comfort.

breadcrumb.label: 7 Days Golden Triangle: A Perfect Blend

hero.heroImageAlt: Golden Triangle Delhi Agra Jaipur comfort tour

overview.heading: 7 Days Golden Triangle: A Perfect Blend: The Full Picture
body: This 7 day version of the Golden Triangle is for travellers who prefer comfort over speed. By spending two nights in each city, you experience Delhi, Agra and Jaipur at a relaxed pace, with time for the markets, the food, the side trips and the moments that a rushed itinerary misses.

Arranged privately from Malaysia, the trip uses better hotels and a gentler rhythm than the 5 day version. Your own vehicle and driver guide give complete flexibility, from a leisurely sunrise at the Taj to an unhurried afternoon in Jaipur's bazaars. It is the Golden Triangle as a holiday, not a sprint.

highlights.heading: Why Travellers from Malaysia Love This Trip

items.title: The Taj Mahal, Unhurried
items.body: With two nights in Agra, you can enjoy the Taj at sunrise, explore Agra Fort, and even catch the Taj from across the river at Mehtab Bagh, without rushing on.

items.title: Delhi in Depth
items.body: Two nights in the capital allow for both Old and New Delhi, from Chandni Chowk and the Red Fort to Humayun's Tomb and the colonial avenues.

items.title: Jaipur at Leisure
items.body: Amber Fort, the City Palace and Hawa Mahal, plus time for the bazaars, the block printers and Rajasthani cuisine, all at a relaxed pace.

days.title: Arrive Delhi
days.description: Met at the airport and transferred to your hotel. Evening at leisure.

days.title: Delhi Sightseeing
days.description: A full day of Old and New Delhi.

days.title: Delhi to Agra
days.description: Drive to Agra with an afternoon at the fort or Mehtab Bagh.

days.title: Taj Mahal, Drive to Jaipur
days.description: Sunrise Taj, then drive to Jaipur via Fatehpur Sikri.

days.title: Jaipur Sightseeing
days.description: The forts and palaces of the Pink City.

days.title: Jaipur at Leisure
days.description: More of Jaipur, with shopping and crafts.

days.title: Depart Jaipur
days.description: Checkout and transfer to the airport for your onward flight.

hotelOptions.heading: Choose Your Comfort Level
hotelOptions.subheading: Centrally located hotels with easy access to the main sights. Pick the tier that suits your style.

whyBook.heading: The Golden Triangle, as a Holiday
whyBook.body: Two nights in each city transforms the Golden Triangle from a sprint into a holiday. We pair the relaxed pace with better hotels and the freedom of a private vehicle. Dhesu has run the route for over 35 years.

points.title: MATTA & IATA Registered
points.body: Fully licensed Malaysian travel agency. We guide you through India e-Visa documentation with every booking.

points.title: Private Tours, Daily Departures
points.body: No minimum group to wait for. Your trip runs on your dates, your pace, your own vehicle and guide.

points.title: A Real Team to Call
points.body: Reachable throughout your trip. Flight delayed, your guide waits. Plans change, we adapt on the ground.

points.title: Group & Custom Pricing
points.body: Travelling as a family or group lowers the per-person cost. Ask us for a tailored quote.

sections.heading: 7 Day Golden Triangle Tour from Malaysia
sections.body:
This 7 day version of the Golden Triangle is for travellers who want to enjoy Delhi, Agra and Jaipur without rushing. Two nights in each city means time for the markets, the food and the side trips.

With better hotels and a private vehicle, it is the Golden Triangle as a comfortable holiday, ideal for couples, families and anyone who values a relaxed pace.

For a more packed version, see our 5 day Golden Triangle; to add Amritsar, the 7 day Golden Triangle plus Amritsar.

sections.heading: Why Choose the 7 Day Comfort Version
sections.body:
The 5 day Golden Triangle covers the icons efficiently, but the 7 day version lets you breathe. Two nights in each city means you can revisit the Taj, linger in Jaipur's bazaars, and explore Delhi's quieter corners.

The slower pace also allows for better hotels and side trips, making it a more restful and rewarding way to experience the classic route.

items.question: Do Malaysians need a visa for India?
items.answer: Yes. Malaysian passport holders apply for an India e-Visa online before departure. The tourist e-Visa covers tourism and short visits and is valid for 30 days from entry. The application is on the official India e-Visa portal, and Dhesu walks you through it when you book. Visa fees are not included in the package price.

items.question: Which airport does this trip use?
items.answer: This is a land-only package: hotels, transfers, tours and guide are included, but international flights are not. Most Malaysian travellers fly from Kuala Lumpur International Airport (KLIA) to Delhi and Jaipur Airports (DEL / JAI). We can recommend suitable flights and timings on request.

items.question: How is this different from the 5 day Golden Triangle?
items.answer: This 7 day version spends two nights in each city, giving a more relaxed pace, better hotels and time for markets, food and side trips. The 5 day version covers the same icons more efficiently. We can advise which suits you.

items.question: What is the best time for the Golden Triangle?
items.answer: October to March is ideal, with pleasant days and cool nights. April to June is very hot on the plains. July to September is the monsoon. Winter mornings can be misty around the Taj but offer atmospheric light.

items.question: Is this trip good for families?
items.answer: Very. The relaxed pace, private vehicle and two nights in each city make it comfortable for families, with less time spent in transit and more flexibility around children's routines and interests.
